productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Printed Maroon Tie
description: Flaunt your royalty in style with this tie from Reid and Taylor that comes with small print of the royal Coat of Arms symbol throughout. The classic maroon shade makes this tie a perfect match for dress shirts - from classic white to black and beige. Length: 150 cm Made of 100% silk for luxurious feel and light sheen Appliqued Coat of Arms symbol throughout One loop and brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in place Tie care Dry clean only
